key_lessons: YOU (real squad) leads after GW20: 1072 vs GEMINI 1050 vs CLAUDE 981 - active management + good captaincy beats baselines.
GEMINI captained Haaland blindly every GW; it hit twice (GW17) but the safe-premium-always strategy left points on the table in his blank weeks.
CLAUDE APEX form-x-fixture ranking over-rotated captains (12 different/wrong picks) - chasing form EV missed the reliable Haaland/premium ceiling.
strategy_flaws: CLAUDE: captain volatility - APEX EV spread picks across low-ceiling players (Foden, Dewsbury-Hall) instead of locking a premium; 1/10 captain hits in 11-20.
GEMINI: rigid Haaland-captain dogma; no fixture-aware switch hurt in his low-return weeks (GW15/18).
Transfer counterfactuals show 5 trades where keeping was better - both bots transferred on blind form noise; threshold should be higher / fixture-gated.
